seoTitle: Wondabyne vs Wongarbon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wondabyne and Wongarbon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wondabyne and Wongarbon.
heading: Wondabyne vs Wongarbon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wondabyne, New South Wales and Wongarbon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wongarbon has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Wondabyne (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wondabyne or Wongarbon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wondabyne has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Wongarbon scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wondabyne scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Wongarbon scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wondabyne or Wongarbon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wongarbon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
